response:
Based on the context provided:

1.  **Identify the coach who was suspended:** The text regarding **Ruffin McNeill** states he was named interim head coach of the Texas Tech Red Raiders "following the suspension and later firing of head coach **Mike Leach**."
2.  **Identify the achievement of the suspended coach:** The text regarding **Mike Leach** states that he was the head coach of the **Texas Tech Red Raiders**, "leading the Red Raiders to **winning seasons in every year of his tenure**."
3.  **Connect the two:** Ruffin McNeill became interim head coach after Mike Leach was suspended. Mike Leach led the team to winning seasons in every year of his **tenure**.

**Answer:** tenure
